doctrine: Hypervisor App is the product client; Workbench is one application surface.
Electron/VS Code is one Workbench adapter host, not product identity or runtime truth.
ioi-workbench is the current Workbench extension/API layer.
IOI daemon is the runtime authority and durable execution boundary.
Tauri/OpenVSCode embedding is legacy extraction inventory and must not be revived.
The tracked adapter metadata and ignored local adapter artifacts live under workbench-adapters/; the root ide/ artifact path is retired.
